headline: Eli Lilly and Company (LLY) is one of the Best Growth Stocks to Buy According Ray Dalio
summary: Eli Lilly and Company (NYSE:LLY) is one of the best growth stocks to buy, according to billionaire Ray Dalio’s Bridgewater Associates. On June 10, the US Food and Drug Administration approved a new dosing regimen for Eli Lilly and Company (NYSE:LLY) in the treatment of patients with moderate to severe atopic dermatitis. The new dosing […]

headline: Taking Advantage Of Short-Term Rotation With Eli Lilly Stock
summary: Eli Lilly is no stranger to the ranks of strong leaders.  From the end of 2019 through July 2024, Eli Lilly gained more than 600% with a compound annual growth rate over 55%.  Eli Lilly started as a half position but on the follow-up strength the next day, we brought it to a full position (4).

headline: Eli Lilly (LLY) Stock Could Be 24.7% Undervalued on Its Growth Narrative
summary: Eli Lilly (LLY) continues to attract attention as investors reassess the stock after recent trading, with shares last closing at US$1,112. With no single headline event, the focus shifts toward fundamentals and recent return patterns. See our latest analysis for Eli Lilly. For context, Eli Lilly’s recent pullback of around 0.9% on the day and 2.1% over the past week comes after a strong 12.5% 1 month share price return and a 42.7% 1 year total shareholder return. This suggests longer term...

headline: FDA Accepts Roche's Filing for Lunsumio VELO-Polivy in LBCL
summary: FDA accepts RHHBY filing for Lunsumio VELO plus Polivy in relapsed or refractory LBCL as a potential chemotherapy-free treatment option.

summary: BIIB is set to acquire RayThera for up to $1 billion, adding anti-inflammatory candidates that could expand its immunology pipeline and future growth.

headline: Chai Discovery Collaborates with Lilly TuneLab to Offer AI Capabilities to Select Biotechs
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, June 18, 2026--Chai Discovery, the AI company engineering models to discover new molecules, today announced that certain Chai Discovery frontier AI model capabilities will be made available to companies participating in the Lilly TuneLab platform.

headline: Charles River Joins Lilly TuneLab to Optimize AI/ML Platform through Nonclinical Testing Expertise
summary: WILMINGTON, Mass., June 18, 2026--Charles River Laboratories International, Inc. (NYSE: CRL) announced a collaboration with Lilly TuneLab, a collaborative AI/ML drug discovery platform created by Eli Lilly and Company (Lilly).

headline: Axcelead DDP Joins Lilly TuneLab to Advance AI Drug Discovery
summary: FUJISAWA, Japan, June 18, 2026--Axcelead Drug Discovery Partners, Inc. (Axcelead DDP) is pleased to announce that it has entered a collaboration with Lilly TuneLab, a collaborative AI/ML drug discovery platform created by Eli Lilly and Company (Lilly).
